name: Box Platform API
description: Box Platform provides functionality to access content stored within Box. It provides endpoints for basic manipulation of files and folders, management of users within an enterprise, as well as more complex topics such as legal holds and retention policies.

capabilities.name: files_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve file metadata by ID.

capabilities.name: files_update
capabilities.description: Update a file's metadata (rename, move, or set description).

capabilities.name: files_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a file, permanently or to trash.

capabilities.name: files_copy
capabilities.description: Create a copy of a file in a different folder.

capabilities.name: files_download
capabilities.description: Download the contents of a file in binary format.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a small file to Box (under 50 MB).

capabilities.name: files_upload_version
capabilities.description: Upload a new version of an existing file.

capabilities.name: files_get_thumbnail
capabilities.description: Get a thumbnail for a file.

capabilities.name: folders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve folder metadata by ID.

capabilities.name: folders_list_items
capabilities.description: List all items in a folder.

capabilities.name: folders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subfolder inside a folder.

capabilities.name: folders_update
capabilities.description: Update a folder (rename or move).

capabilities.name: folders_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a folder and its contents.

capabilities.name: folders_copy
capabilities.description: Create a copy of a folder.

capabilities.name: search_content
capabilities.description: Search for files and folders across Box.

capabilities.name: collaborations_create
capabilities.description: Create a collaboration to share a file or folder with a user or group.

capabilities.name: collaborations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific collaboration.

capabilities.name: collaborations_update
capabilities.description: Update a collaboration role.

capabilities.name: collaborations_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a collaboration.

capabilities.name: collaborations_list_pending
capabilities.description: List all pending collaborations.

capabilities.name: comments_create
capabilities.description: Create a comment on a file.

capabilities.name: comments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific comment.

capabilities.name: comments_update
capabilities.description: Update a comment.

capabilities.name: comments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a comment.

capabilities.name: users_get_current
capabilities.description: Get information about the currently authenticated user.

capabilities.name: shared_links_find
capabilities.description: Find a file or folder by its shared link URL.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook to monitor events on a file or folder.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.
